overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The player moves from covered walkways under massive overpasses through neon-lit commercial streets and narrow alleys, encountering pedestrians and light traffic in a dense urban environment with prominent cyan and magenta neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk beneath massive concrete overpass, passing neon-lit shop fronts

notable_agents.action: standing near pink neon-lit shop entrance

entered.detail: massive curved concrete highway overpass dominating the upper frame
bright pink neon signage illuminating a storefront entrance
cylindrical metal trash receptacle on sidewalk
tall street lamp with overhead lighting fixture

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive concrete overpass in a sheltered pedestrian zone. Pink neon signs illuminate shop fronts on the right while scattered debris litters the wet concrete sidewalk. The atmosphere is dense with urban decay and cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with outdoor seating beneath skyscraper

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza area with outdoor seating
approaches crosswalk at Brookland street intersection

agents.ego_description: emerging from under the overpass into an open plaza, approaching a major street intersection

notable_agents.action: sitting at outdoor table with red plastic chairs

entered.detail: cluster of red plastic chairs and tables on the plaza
tall modern building with numerous illuminated windows rising in the background
street sign reading 'Brookland' suspended over intersection
traffic signal pole with illuminated lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza with outdoor seating featuring distinctive red chairs. A massive skyscraper with illuminated windows dominates the background. The camera approaches the Brookland street intersection where traffic lights and crosswalk markings become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: major street intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: crossing the street at Brookland intersection alongside other pedestrians
completes crossing and turns onto sidewalk continuing down the street

agents.ego_description: navigating across the wet asphalt crosswalk at the intersection, avoiding vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving through the intersection
pedestrian with glowing purple umbrella crossing the street

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
rain-soaked asphalt reflecting street lights and neon signs
storefront illuminated with bright cyan neon lighting
horizontal metal slat fencing running along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wet asphalt intersection at Brookland street alongside other pedestrians including one with a glowing umbrella. Vehicles pass through the intersection as the camera navigates to the opposite sidewalk where cyan neon storefronts become prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with atmospheric fog

events.description: visibility decreases as fog and mist thicken between the high-rise buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-soaked sidewalk past brightly lit neon storefronts, observing the atmospheric conditions

notable_agents.action: pedestrian huddled near the cyan-lit storefront entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated cyan sign with 'VW' lettering on building facade
tall vertical red neon light strip adjacent to storefront
thick cables suspended between buildings spanning the street

segments.scene_description: Walking past intensely bright cyan and red neon signs reflecting off the wet pavement. Overhead power lines crisscross between buildings as atmospheric fog reduces visibility. The environment feels dense with cyberpunk urban density and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between high-rise buildings

events.description: enters narrow alleyway with reduced lighting and metal fencing
exits narrow alley back onto main commercial street

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow dimly lit alley, passing pedestrians and makeshift shelters, then emerging back to the main street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red illuminated umbrella walking toward camera
person sitting near cardboard boxes and makeshift shelter

entered.detail: tall dark concrete wall of adjacent building creating narrow corridor
stacked cardboard boxes and debris indicating makeshift shelter
massive cylindrical support column for the overhead structure
dark colored car parked along the street

segments.scene_description: The environment compresses into a narrow alleyway with dark walls and minimal lighting. Pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas pass by while others rest near cardboard shelters. The camera emerges from the alley back onto a wider street with parked vehicles and more pedestrian activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban underpass into a wide, neon-lit city intersection. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass in a pedestrian zone, where pink neon signs cast a glow over wet sidewalks littered with debris. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens into a broad plaza featuring red outdoor seating and a towering skyscraper that dominates the skyline. The scene then shifts toward the Brookland street intersection, where the camera crosses the rain-slicked asphalt alongside pedestrians and a figure with a glowing umbrella. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera reaches the opposite sidewalk, where the lighting transitions from pink tones to prominent cyan neon storefronts.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, neon-lit urban corridor that compresses into a dark alleyway before reopening onto a bustling city street. It begins by gliding past intensely bright cyan and red neon signs that cast vivid reflections across wet pavement, while overhead power lines crisscross through a thick, atmospheric fog. As the camera moves forward, the wide environment suddenly compresses into a narrow alleyway defined by dark walls and minimal lighting, where pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas pass by those resting near cardboard shelters. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the shadows back onto a wider street, shifting from the claustrophobic alley to an open area filled with parked vehicles and increased pedestrian activity.
